title: NDK-1 descriptor
description: Structural validation of an NDK-1 descriptor. Semantic rules that JSON Schema cannot enforce (UTF-8 byte length, Unicode NFC, duplicate JSON keys, integer-vs-float distinction of `ndk`) MUST be checked separately per SPEC.md sections 8-11.

ndk.description: Major NDK version. Must be the integer 1.

subject.description: Human-readable subject. Full rules (NFC, byte length, control chars, edge whitespace) are semantic; this pattern only checks the scheme prefix and that at least one ':' is present.

type.description: Seed to key transform name (defined by NDK Profiles).
